base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of assembled_structure_pipe_tall — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Pre-composed tall pipe — 2-tile wide × 4-tile tall green pipe showing cap + 3 body segments. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Pre-composed tall pipe — 2-tile wide × 4-tile tall green pipe showing cap + 3 body segments; reference composition for level-build visualization
